pages.description: AgentLock authorization protocol: 3-layer model (Agent/Gate/Execution), token management, policy engine, rate limiting, memory gate, redaction, /authorization dashboard

pages.title: Ralph Methodology
pages.description: Ralph autonomous methodology: PRD-driven execution, story states, escalation rules, flowchart visualization

pages.title: UPM - Unified Project Management
pages.description: UPM execution tracking: session registration, agent-story binding, wave progress, lifecycle events

pages.title: Skills Tracking and Analytics
pages.description: Skills dashboard v6.4.0: three-tier health card grid, Fix Wizard (diagnose→select→preview→done), Session Timeline, AG-UI Health tab, WCAG 2.1 AA, SkillsHook JS

pages.title: Claude Usage Tracking
pages.description: Claude model/token usage per project: effort levels (low/medium/high/intensive), token counters (input/output/cache), real-time PubSub updates, usage recording API

pages.title: Notifications System
pages.description: Toast notification system: levels, categories, duration, built-in types, formation/UPM events

pages.title: System Architecture
pages.description: OTP supervision tree, GenServer stores (auth modules v7.0.0, ClaudeUsageStore v6.4.0, ShowcaseDataStore v6.0.0, SkillsRegistryStore v4.2.0, AgentActivityLog v6.1.0), ETS tables, PubSub topics, data flow

pages.title: REST API Reference
pages.description: Complete REST API: authorization (v7.0.0), agents, notifications, UPM, formations, showcase, activity log (v6.1.0), domain controllers (v6.2.0), ports, usage (v6.4.0), skills, config, export/import

pages.title: LiveView Pages
pages.description: All LiveView pages including AuthorizationLive (/authorization v7.0.0), RoutingLive (/routing v7.0.0), UsageLive (/usage v6.4.0), SkillsLive (v6.4.0 redesign), PortsLive, CcemOverviewLive; AgentPanel, PortPanel components; integration test suite

pages.title: PubSub Events Reference
pages.description: All PubSub topics and event types: agents, notifications, config, tasks, commands, UPM, alerts, environments

pages.title: AG-UI Protocol
pages.description: AG-UI event types, SSE streaming, state management, and integration endpoints

pages.title: Authorization (AgentLock)
pages.description: AgentLock authorization protocol: Types, PolicyEngine, TokenStore, SessionStore, RateLimiter, ContextTracker, MemoryGate, RedactionEngine, AuthorizationGate, AgentLifecycle modules; ETS tables; PubSub topics

pages.title: SwiftUI Menubar Helper (CCEMHelper)
pages.description: CCEMHelper SwiftUI menubar app: APMClient actor, EnvironmentMonitor, UPM status, models

pages.title: CCEM UI — Dual-Section Sidebar and Management Hub
pages.description: CCEM UI v6.0.0: dual-section sidebar nav (CCEM Management + APM Monitoring), CcemOverviewLive /ccem hub, CCEM Assistant AG-UI callout, dynamic header branding, icon convention, adding new pages

pages.title: Port Management
